title: hieracium jankae subsp. macranthelophorum
intro: Hieracium jankae subsp. macranthelophorum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Hieracium jankae subsp. macranthelophorum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its ability to act as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Hieracium jankae subsp. macranthelophorum often involve drying and infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
